title: nil Language Server Settings
description: Settings forwarded under the `nil` section to the nil Nix language server. See https://github.com/oxalica/nil for the upstream reference.

command.description: External formatter command and arguments (e.g. ["nixfmt"]). Reads on stdin, writes to stdout.

excludedFiles.description: Workspace-relative paths or globs whose diagnostics are ignored entirely.

binary.description: Path to the `nix` binary used for flake operations.

maxMemoryMB.description: Memory ceiling (MB) for nix subprocesses. null disables the limit.

autoArchive.description: Automatically run `nix flake archive` on flake inputs for offline indexing. null = prompt.

autoEvalInputs.description: Eagerly evaluate flake inputs to surface cross-input references.

nixpkgsInputName.description: Name of the flake input whose nixpkgs is used for option definitions.
